t_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
t_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

t_ch: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
t_en: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

t_ch: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一场智慧花园的学术交流得以被闻见：
t_en: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and an academic exchange in the Garden of Wisdom can be heard:

t_ch: 您这套兵法中所记载的战术，恕我直言有些过于理想……
t_en: The tactics recorded in this strategy of yours are a little too idealistic, if I may say...

t_ch: 不可能有比这更完美的作战理论！这可是我参悟瑟希斯的原始智慧，又经过重重计算得出的完美计划。
t_en: There is nothing more perfect than this battle theory! This was an epiphany comprehended from the primordial wisdom of Cerces, and a plan perfected after countless iterations.

t_ch: 很抱歉打扰两位的讨论，但依照我随尼卡多利大人四处征战所见，您的作战理论较为古典，如今运用于应对黑潮未必奏效。
t_en: I apologize for interrupting your discourse, but from my many expeditions accompanying Lord Nikador in their conquests, your tactical theory is a tad antiquated and poses little effect against the black tide right now.

t_ch: 您是…悬锋城最德高望重的大学者！
t_en: You are... the most prestigious scholar in Castrum Kremnos!

t_ch: 原来是您！大人今日到访讲学，实属智慧花园的荣幸！
t_en: It is you indeed! It is the Garden of Wisdom's utmost honor to be audience to Your Highness' lecture today!

t_ch: 战势千变万化，不可全依典籍记载。若二位不介意，可随我移步城外的空地，我愿在实战中向你们演示，只要此举能精进联盟的战术。
t_en: Battle situations are volatile and fluid. Strategic texts should not be wholly relied upon. If you two don't mind, walk with me to a field outside the city. I would be willing to demonstrate to you in actual combat, as long as my pointers will refine the alliance's tactics.

t_ch: 没想到，今天竟然有机会领教天谴之矛的战术，我要将其补充进我的理论中。请您多指点！
t_en: I never thought I would have the chance to receive battle guidance from the Lance of Fury. I shall hone my theories with your advice. We'll be in your care!

t_ch: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
t_en: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

t_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
t_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

t_ch: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
t_en: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

t_ch: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一则泰坦们的捉贼轶事得以被闻见：
t_en: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and a story of Titans apprehending a thief can be heard:

t_ch: 蛮王今日如此有雅致四处闲逛，难不成是又有心碎之事在外散心？
t_en: For the savage king to be strolling the streets so leisurely... mayhaps you're trying to take your mind off another heartbreaking issue?

t_ch: 拿我打趣就免了。您美丽的脸庞写满了忧虑，我们是否都因面前这只贼灵烦忧？
t_en: Dispense with your teasing. Your beautiful face is fraught with worry. Aren't we all vexed about this Spirithief before us?

t_ch: 我的神庙已久未供奉足以享用的秘酿，叫我险些以为我的孩子们已将我遗忘，原来都是被这小贼偷摸走了——
t_en: My temple has not been offered enough ambrosia for a long while, and I was worried my children might have forgotten me. Instead, it was this thief who took it all...

t_ch: 哎、哎哟！大人的丝线快要将我勒断气了…我从未见您饮用过那秘酿，您不如慷慨施舍给我嘛…才不算浪费嘛。
t_en: O—Ouch! You're suffocating me with your threads, Your Highness! I have never seen you imbibing the offered ambrosia, so why not grant those to me instead... At least it won't go to waste.

t_ch: 看来并非仅我一人被骚扰。这贼灵在我的军队四处煽风点火，致使我的要将在军营内颜面尽失，不可饶恕！
t_en: It appears I'm not the only one who has been harassed. This Spirithief has been sowing lies and discord amongst my army's ranks, causing my generals' honor to be sullied. Unforgivable!

t_ch: 我们怀疑这小贼与冥河中新升起的泰坦有关。
t_en: We suspect this thief is in cahoots with the Titan newly arisen from the River of Souls.

t_ch: 管它是谁的造物，敢扰乱我的军队，军规伺候，你将被我斩杀化作天谴之锋的战魂！
t_en: Who cares whose creation it is. Whoever dares disrupt my legion will be charged according to martial law. You will be executed by me and turned into a warring soul for my Blade of Fury!

t_ch: 桀桀桀！等你们有本事抓住我再说吧，溜了——
t_en: Tsk tsk! Only if you two can catch me! I'm off!

t_ch: 滚回来！
t_en: Get back here!

t_ch: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
t_en: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

t_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
t_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

t_ch: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
t_en: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

t_ch: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一次赴死的和谈得以被闻见：
t_en: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and a doomed parley for peace can be heard:

t_ch: 天谴之矛，尼卡多利！你的英勇举世无双，你的长矛直入天际。
t_en: Lance of Fury, Nikador! Your valor is rivaled by none, your lance thrusting through the clouds.

t_ch: 我的战友，是什么让你血液的奔腾冷却，只余一滩死水的沉寂？你的刀剑不再公正，你的目光日渐浑浊。
t_en: My comrade, what has caused your boiling blood to cool, leaving only a stagnant silence? Your blade is no longer just, and your gaze turns turbid with time.

t_ch: 我愿为你拭去心中的迷雾——请重拾你的神格，回归往昔的荣耀；从此黑潮便不再可畏，明日将照耀翁法罗斯的大地。
t_en: I am willing to disperse the fog in your heart. Please reclaim your divinity and return to the path of glory. The black tide will not be feared henceforth, and tomorrow will shine upon the great land of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 不速之客，不请自来。
t_en: Uninvited visitors are not welcome here.

t_ch: 我们请求与天谴之矛对话，而非你，又或你那虚假的王。
t_en: We seek an audience with the Lance of Fury, not with you, nor your false king.

t_ch: 勇者不与弱者共舞，悬锋之伟大由鲜血浇灌。
t_en: The valiant does not consort with the weak. The majesty of Kremnos is nurtured by fresh blood.

t_ch: 笑话，小人难企英雄之境，你不够格替泰坦发言。
t_en: What a farce. The petty will never reach the greatness of heroes. You are unworthy to speak for a Titan.

t_ch: 卫兵，放下城门。
t_en: Guards, lower the city gate.

t_ch: 尼卡多利，面对我——
t_en: Nikador, face me—!

t_ch: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
t_en: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

t_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
t_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

t_ch: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
t_en: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

t_ch: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一群人无法逃离的命运得以被闻见：
t_en: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and the fate of a group of people unable to flee can be heard:

t_ch: 现在的局势到底有多么糟糕，我们才会逃至这鬼怪多出的命运重渊啊……
t_en: How dire is the situation now that we had to flee to this haunted Abyss of Fate...

t_ch: 别说这种丧气话，无论何时都不要放弃希望，振作起来！
t_en: Stop the depressing talk. We mustn't give up hope no matter what. Keep your spirits up!

t_ch: 喂喂，前面那些穿着铠甲的…是奥赫玛的援兵吧！喂——我们在这里啊！！！
t_en: Hey look, those armored figures up ahead... They're Okheman reinforcements, aren't they! Heyyyy! We're over here!!!

t_ch: 等下…那是…新型号的悬锋战士？！
t_en: Wait... They're... the new Kremnos Warrior models!?

t_ch: <size=28>别喊了，快停下！！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Stop yelling! Pipe down now!!!</size>

t_ch: 伟哉，吾主尼卡多利；壮哉，战争之魂不朽。
t_en: Great is our Lord Nikador. Glorious is the immortality of the soul of war.

t_ch: 为什么会追到这里？他们是疯了吗？
t_en: Why have they pursued us here? Have they gone mad?

t_ch: 为天谴之矛献上汝之战魂……
t_en: Relinquish your warring soul to the Lance of Fury...

t_ch: 还有作战能力的，统统上前迎战！掩护平民和伤员先走——
t_en: Those who can still fight, form up! Cover the civilians and wounded and let them escape first...

t_ch: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
t_en: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

t_ch: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
t_en: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

t_ch: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
t_en: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

t_ch: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一颗勇者心脏的跳动得以被闻见：
t_en: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and the beating of a warrior's heart can be heard:

t_ch: 撩动万物的斗争者，庇护万邦的守护者啊——请让我族伴你征伐，随你撒下恐惧的种子，点燃战争的火光！
t_en: The fighter who provokes all life, the guardian who protects all states — please allow my clan to accompany you in conquest, to follow you in sowing seeds of fear, to light the torches of war!

t_ch: 泰坦的战场，无需孱弱的造物踏足。离开此处，或尽数投身冥河。
t_en: The Titans' battlefield has no need for mewling creations. Leave this place, or be tossed into the River of Souls like many before you.

t_ch: 若你愿向我们发起屠戮的「纷争」，那就请允许我们对你张弩竖剑，来换一份战死的荣耀。
t_en: If you declare the "Strife" of slaughter upon us, please allow us to draw our bows and unsheathe our swords against you, in exchange for a glorious death.

t_ch: 凡人莫要妄想染指神的显耀。
t_en: Mortals should not foolishly aspire to the lofty glories of gods.

t_ch: 神也莫要轻易卑视凡人的决心。
t_en: And gods should not take light of the resolution of mortals.

t_ch: 黑潮将生出可怖于纷争本身的绝望，汝等可敢直视这死渊中的黧黑之相？
t_en: The black tide will birth despair more terrifying than Strife itself. Dare you stay your gaze on the dark visages within this abyss of death?

t_ch: 死亡有何可怖？赴战场，垂英名，纵使葬于他乡，也胜过苟延残喘的安详。
t_en: What terror is there in death? Charging into battle to stake your heroic claim, falling in a land far from home — that is an ending that triumphs over a mundane existence in peace.

t_ch: 我们千百年来只是受你庇护的羔羊，但你需要一群狼与狮，成为你最勇猛的兵戈，令你的剑锋悬于万民之上！
t_en: We are but lambs sheltered by you for eons, but you need a pack of wolves, a pride of lions, to become your fiercest soldiers, to raise your blades above the masses!

t_ch: 好，那就让你的族人向我证明这份勇气吧——<color=#dbc291ff>歌耳戈</color>。
t_en: So be it. Your clan will prove your courage to me — <color=#dbc291ff>Gorgo</color>.

t_ch: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
t_en: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

t_ch: 早些时候在市集消失的孩子，又突然出现在你的面前。
t_en: The child who disappeared into the bustling market earlier on suddenly appears before you again.

t_ch: 你去哪儿了？
t_en: Where have you been?

t_ch: 来摘桃子了？
t_en: Here comes the loot ninja.

t_ch: 速度属性拉得挺高啊。
t_en: Your SPD is pretty maxed out.

t_ch: 抱歉，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，暂且听我一言——
t_en: Sorry, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, please hear me out...

t_ch: 神的眼目总是孤独的，我们在岁月的洪流中不过一粒尘埃，随着欧洛尼斯呼出的流风而飘扬。
t_en: The gods' eyes are ever lonely. Our years in the flux of time are but a speck of dust, floating about in Oronyx's billows.

t_ch: 我们在昨日被吹到凡人的坟茔，来日又飘到神明的宫殿。我们看见正义、失心、荣耀、背叛、疯狂…但我们无权裁决。
t_en: We were blown to a mortal's grave yesterday, and drift to a godly palace today. We see justice, hysteria, glory, betrayal, madness... but we have no right to judge.

t_ch: 因为，眼目并无立场，更无目的，惟有观测的职责。
t_en: Because eyes have no stance nor purpose, only the duty of observance.

t_ch: 什么眼目？什么职责？
t_en: What eyes? What duty?

t_ch: 我如此耀眼，怎会是尘埃？
t_en: I'm mad bright. How can I be dust?

t_ch: …确实呢。
t_en: ...True.

t_ch: 怎么路边小孩也在讲谜语？
t_en: So some weird kid is dishing out riddles now?

t_ch: 哎呀，只是家里长辈的告诫。
t_en: Ah, they're just warnings from elders at home.

t_ch: 「…晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远。」
t_en: "...The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome..."

t_ch: 我族是艾格勒在人间的眼睛，即便它已阖上百眼，我们依然坚守。
t_en: My clan is the eye of Aquila in the mortal realm. Even though they have closed their hundred eyes, we still persist in our duties.

t_ch: 本想向{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}传递这份神圣的职责，但看来我挑错了对象——你并非是一位沉默的「观众」。
t_en: I wanted to impart this sacred duty to {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, but it looks like I've picked the wrong person — you are not a silent "spectator."

t_ch: 当然，我是主角。
t_en: Obviously not. I'm the main character.

t_ch: 当然，我不是哑巴。
t_en: Of course not. I'm not mute.

t_ch: 没交互的剧情已经过时了！
t_en: A narrative without interaction is so passé!

t_ch: 呵呵，你要是还有下次相遇，我希望你能让{RUBY_B#「晨昏之眼」}我的主人{RUBY_E#}看到更伟大的东西。
t_en: Heh heh, if we do meet again, I hope you will let {RUBY_B#Eye of Twilight}my master{RUBY_E#} see even greater things.

t_ch: 并不陌生的离场方式，你只是眨了下眼，眼前的孩子便消失得无影无踪，只留你一人在原地消化她的话语。
t_en: In a most familiar mode of departure, in the blink of an eye, the child before you has vanished yet again, leaving you standing alone to digest her words.

t_ch: （艾格勒的眼目……）
t_en: (Aquila's eyes...)

t_ch: 呀，灰宝，你来了！快看，这些小家伙好可爱，也很有精神，要是能带回庭院就好啦。
t_en: Hey, Grayie, you're here! Look, these little ones are so cute and energetic. Only if I can bring them back to the Grove.

t_ch: ——嗷！嗷呜呜！
t_en: Ah! Awoowoo!

t_ch: 可爱嗷呜！
t_en: What a cute awoo!

t_ch: 嗷呜！嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: Ah! Awoo awoo!

t_ch: 听到你的夸奖，小奇美拉很开心呢。它说，虽然你个子高高的，但也很可爱！
t_en: Hearing your praise, the little chimera is delighted. It says, despite your tall height, you're still really cute!

t_ch: …感觉不如帕姆。
t_en: ...It's not as cute as Pom-Pom.

t_ch: …嗷呜？嗷…嗷嗷呜！
t_en: ...Awoo? Ah... ah awoo!

t_ch: 啊，小奇美拉生气了！它说，虽然不知道帕姆是什么品种，但肯定不如它可爱！
t_en: Ah, the little chimera is angry! It says, although it doesn't know what breed Pom-Pom is, but it's definitely not as cute!

t_ch: 哈哈，在这些小家伙面前说话可得注意点哦，它们非常机灵，听得懂我们究竟在说什么。
t_en: Haha, you ought to be more careful when you're talking in front of these little ones. They're very bright, and they do understand what we're saying.

t_ch: 你…能听懂奇美拉的叫声？
t_en: You... can understand the howls of a chimera?

t_ch: 差点忘了，灰宝没有在树庭学习过，缺少这方面的知识……
t_en: I almost forgot, you never studied at the Grove, Grayie, hence you lack knowledge in this area...

t_ch: 不过没关系，我来给你施加一点{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福，这样就能解决啦。
t_en: But that's no matter. Allow me to cast the blessings of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, and this should solve it.

t_ch: 凑近点，把眼睛闭上——
t_en: Come closer, and close your eyes...

t_ch: 恍惚间，你感到些微的暖意渗入身体，像是发丝的轻柔触感，又像是午后庭院里和煦的阳光，困倦连同着过往的美好记忆涌入脑海，编织出最深沉的梦境……
t_en: In a trance, you feel a slight warmth flow into your body, like a soft caress of a strand of hair, or the gentle embrace of the afternoon sunlight in a quiet garden. Drowsiness and fond memories of the past wash into your brain, weaving them into the fabric of your dreams...

t_ch: …愿你的理性清晰。愿{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}捍卫你的思想。好啦~可以睁开眼睛了哦。
t_en: ...May your reason remain clear. May {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} guard your thoughts. All done, you can open your eyes now!

t_ch: 感觉怎么样？再去和小奇美拉对话试试吧。
t_en: How do you feel? Try talking to the little chimera!

t_ch: 嗷呜？
t_en: Awooo?

t_ch: 小奇美拉睁着大大的眼睛望着你，似乎很期待和你进行一番亲切友好的交流。
t_en: The little chimera gazes at you with its wide eyes, as if eager to engage in a warm and friendly exchange with you.

t_ch: （表示你的善意）
t_en: (Show your goodwill)

t_ch: 你好？我是来自星穹列车的无名客，名字是……
t_en: Hello? I'm a Nameless from the Astral Express, and my name is...

t_ch: 嗷呜！我听说过你，好早以前就想和你认识了！蹭蹭~蹭蹭~
t_en: Awoo! I've heard of you, and I've always wanted to get to know you! *nuzzle*

t_ch: 别当真，这家伙见谁都这么说。
t_en: Don't take it seriously. This fella says it to everyone.

t_ch: （给它们来个下马威）
t_en: (Show them your authority)

t_ch: 先说清楚，我可是黄金裔的贵客，奥赫玛是我的地盘，都放尊重点！
t_en: First things first, I am an esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, and Okhema is my turf, so pay your respects!

t_ch: …嗷呜？嗷呜？你说啥，我听不见。
t_en: ...Awoo? Awoo? Come again?

t_ch: 小点声，有意见也先忍着，万一这人成了我们的管理员呢？
t_en: Lower your voice, and hold your tongue. What if this one's our administrator?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。都说它们很聪明啦，就是偶尔有些调皮，别在意别在意。
t_en: Hahaha, I told you they were smart, just playful sometimes. Don't mind them.

t_ch: 并且，小奇美拉也很能干。最近奥赫玛不是遭到了袭击嘛，到处都乱糟糟的。多亏了这些小家伙帮大家工作，这才解决了人手不足的问题。该好好感谢它们才是呢。
t_en: And little chimeras are very capable. Okhema was under attack recently, so it's a mess everywhere. It's all thanks to these little ones that we managed to solve the labor issue. We should be grateful to them.

t_ch: 不用谢！反正我也不是自愿工作的！
t_en: No need! It's not like I volunteered for the job!

t_ch: 奇美拉都是这样的吗？
t_en: Are all chimeras like this?

t_ch: 跟我想的不太一样。
t_en: They're different than what I imagined.

t_ch: 这座生命花园是奇美拉的培育场所和栖息地，灰宝感兴趣的话，可以到处转转哦。
t_en: This Garden of Life is the chimeras' nurturing ground and dwelling. If you're interested, you can take a look around, Grayie.

t_ch: 小家伙们的外形特征和性格都各不相同，说不定会碰上你特别中意的！
t_en: They all look different with unique personalities. There just might be one you fancy!

t_ch: 起来！都起来！…允许你们休息了吗！快干活，我不是来看你们偷懒的！
t_en: Get up! All of you! ...Did I allow you all to take a break!? Get your feet moving. I didn't come here to watch you all slack off!

t_ch: 我就纳闷了，为什么别的小队都像模像样的，你们就是啥都干不好呢？没用，给人看笑话，还挂在我名下，丢我的脸！
t_en: I'm just vexed as to why you're all such slackers compared to other squads that're role models? Useless and making fools of yourselves, and dragging my good name through the mud too!

t_ch: …咦？好像有人正在凶那些小奇美拉。灰宝，我们去看看吧！
t_en: ...Eh? Looks like that person is being mean to those little chimeras. Grayie, let's go take a look!

t_ch: 我最瞧不起虐待动物的人了！
t_en: I utterly disdain those who abuse animals!

t_ch: 这是我该管的事情吗？
t_en: Is this something I should be involved in?

t_ch: 生命花园是奥赫玛重要的学术场所，当然不允许有人在这胡闹。快过去吧！
t_en: The Garden of Life is a key academic venue of Okhema. No nonsense is allowed here. Get over there quickly!

t_ch: 跟我没关系！是这家伙一点用都没有，只会在那哭，我不要和它一起！
t_en: This has nothing to do with me! It's this fella who's utterly useless — it only knows how to cry, so I don't want to be with it!

t_ch: 嗷呜…但工作真的很辛苦啊。嗷呜……
t_en: Awoo... But work is so hard... Awoo...

t_ch: 唉，就知道「嗷呜嗷呜」叫，跟谁扮可怜呢？我是来监督你们干活的…干活，明白？要的是你的剩余价值，不是情绪价值！
t_en: Bah, wailing is all you know. Who are you trying to fool? My job is to monitor your work... So work, got it? It's your surplus value that's needed, not your emotional value!

t_ch: 工作做不好，名次也提不上去。摊上你们这群没用的东西，算我倒霉！
t_en: Your ranking won't go up if you don't do a good job. Just my luck running into you useless lot!

t_ch: 你好…这位先生，小奇美拉已经道过歉，就请别训斥它们了。这种严苛的管教方式，是不会得到好结果的呀。
t_en: Hello sir... these little chimeras already apologized, so please stop berating them. Such harsh disciplinary treatment will never result in positive outcomes.

t_ch: 在和元老院议员说话前，是不是该先检查下自己的身份？
t_en: Shouldn't you be checking yourself before speaking to a Council Elder?

t_ch: …不对，我见过你，想想…哟，这不是伟大的黄金裔嘛？对，你们是奥赫玛的领导者，高所有人一等，当然有资格教我做事。
t_en: ...Hang on, I've seen you before. Wait... Oh, if it isn't a great Chrysos Heir? Ah yes, leaders of Okhema, and an echelon higher than the rest — of course you are qualified to tell me how to do my job.

t_ch: 那就敬请指点——这群毫无用处的奇美拉，到底该怎么管教？
t_en: Then please enlighten me: How would I discipline this group of utterly useless chimeras?

t_ch: 你先做个错误示范吧。
t_en: You should demonstrate a bad example first.

t_ch: 行啊，只要你别被它们干的蠢事吓到了就成！
t_en: Sure, as long as you don't regret witnessing their witless antics!

t_ch: 啊，不对不对。这个管理方式的问题也太大了，小奇美拉可比你以为的要能干得多。
t_en: Ah, no no. Such a management method presents too many problems. The little chimeras are far more capable than you think.

t_ch: 灰宝！正好你在，就麻烦演示给他看看啦！
t_en: Grayie! Good thing you're here. I'll have to trouble you to demonstrate to him!

t_ch: 我就是最友善的动物朋友！
t_en: I am the friendliest friend to animals!

t_ch: 原来灰宝很受小动物们欢迎嘛？那就方便多啦，来，我们现在就开始！
t_en: So you're very popular among little animals? That's much more convenient then. Come, let us begin!

t_ch: 需要学奇美拉叫吗？
t_en: I need to mimic the sound a chimera makes?

t_ch: 当然不用！在乱想些什么呢，别紧张，我会认真教你的！
t_en: Of course not! What is going through your mind? Don't get antsy. I will teach you in earnest!

t_ch: 啊，我啥都不会。
t_en: Ah, I don't know anything.

t_ch: 没事，不是有我在吗。别紧张，我会认真教你的！
t_en: Don't worry. I'm here, aren't I? Don't be anxious. I'll teach you in earnest!

t_ch: 妙！太妙了！不愧是黄金裔，奥赫玛的大英雄！
t_en: Wonderful! Simply wonderful! That's a Chrysos Heir for you, Okhema's great heroes!

t_ch: 要是你们在对抗那个黑潮的时候，能这么厉害的话，城邦肯定就有救了吧？
t_en: If you're just as strong when the black tide comes, the city will surely be saved, no?

t_ch: 正好，我有个绝佳的提议——既然两位的管教如此出色，不妨…就从我这买走这支队伍的管理权如何？我天资愚钝，就是个普通人，可担不起这样的重任！
t_en: Perfect timing. I've got a most excellent proposal: Since your management skills are so superb, why not... buy this squad's rights from me? I'm but an ordinary person of mediocre talent unable to bear such heavy responsibility!

t_ch: 管得这么烂，还敢要钱？！
t_en: You handled them like trash, and you want me to pay!?

t_ch: 怎么不要？我可是费了好多心思，才弄来的这个管理员职位。再说了，奇美拉是帮人干活的劳动力，有产出的，转让当然要收费。
t_en: Why not? I went through a lot of trouble to get this administrator position. Also, chimeras are labor to help people's work. Since there's output, of course I must be paid for it.

t_ch: 工作，就得有回报。黄金裔不会是习惯了发号施令，连这个基本的道理都不懂吧？
t_en: Work must be compensated. You're telling me Chrysos Heirs are so used to everyone being at their beck and call, that they don't understand basic principles anymore?

t_ch: 你该不会是想转嫁责任吧。
t_en: You're not trying to absolve yourself of your burden, are you?

t_ch: 这叫能者多劳，黄金裔是救世主，理应帮我们这样的公民排忧解难。
t_en: The more capable often have to do more. Chrysos Heirs are saviors, so they naturally should help us common folk lighten our burdens.

t_ch: 要是继续跟着我，这群奇美拉不知道还要吃多少苦头，你们不是觉得心疼吗，那就发发善心，帮它们逃离苦痛的深渊呗。
t_en: If they continue to follow me, who knows how much more hardship these chimeras will suffer? Does your heart not bleed for them? Spare some benevolence and deliver them from the abyss of suffering.

t_ch: 灰宝，我有点生气了……
t_en: Grayie, I'm getting angry...

t_ch: 想扮英雄，又不愿意花钱？奥赫玛哪有这么好的事。
t_en: You want to play hero and not pay a dime? There's never a free lunch in Okhema.

t_ch: 嘿，我要的不多，十万利衡币足矣。塔兰顿在上，自会见证这笔交易的公正！
t_en: Heh, I don't want much, just a hundred thousand Balance Coins for them. Talanton above will witness the fairness of this deal!

t_ch: （掏出钱包）
t_en: (Take out your wallet)

t_ch: 爽快！拿来吧，权利就得用东西来换。那边的小姑娘，你可要记好了！
t_en: You're a forthright one! Take them. Authority must be exchanged for something. That little lady over there, you best remember this scene!

t_ch: 灰宝，等等。别便宜了这种家伙。
t_en: Grayie, wait. Don't make it easy for this fellow.

t_ch: 我才不会付钱给你！
t_en: I'm not paying you a single coin!

t_ch: 没问题。元老院向来尊崇民意，和那些自以为是的救世主不一样，你当然有拒绝的权利。
t_en: Of course. The Council of Elders has always respected the will of the people, unlike some arrogant saviors. You obviously have the right to refuse.

t_ch: 但同样的，只要这群奇美拉还归我负责，该如何管教就是我的权利，谁都没资格指手画脚。听到了吗，那边的小姑娘？
t_en: But similarly, as long as these chimeras are my responsibility, it is my just right to treat them as I see fit. No one else has the authority to interfere. Got that, little lady standing there?

t_ch: 灰宝，别和他急。我来处理。
t_en: Grayie, don't get riled up by him. I'll handle this.

t_ch: 这位先生，「天空」祭司间流传着一句谚语，叫做——等{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}睁开眼睛。意思就是：在天亮前，别轻易做出判断。
t_en: Sir, there is a saying passed down among the Sky Priests, which is... Wait for {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila {RUBY_E#} to open their eyes. It means: Don't make hasty judgments before the sun rises.

t_ch: 要是过早以为自己胜券在握，可是会难看的呀。
t_en: If you think you've already won, it could end up quite embarrassing for you.

t_ch: …什么意思？这些奇美拉都挂在我的名下，你还能明着抢不成？
t_en: ...What do you mean? These chimeras are under my management. What, you're going to rob me of them?

t_ch: 小奇美拉是很聪明的生物，听得懂我们的话语。它们有自己独特的想法，也能做出选择。
t_en: Chimeras are very smart creatures and understand our language. They have their own unique way of thinking and will make their own choices too.

t_ch: ——想跟随我和灰宝的小奇美拉，请站到这边来！
t_en: ...The chimeras that wish to follow me and Grayie, stand over here!

t_ch: …可以跑路了嗷呜？
t_en: ...We are switching squads now?

t_ch: 嗷呜！我要来，我才不想继续跟着这种管理员！我要换队，我要辞职！
t_en: Awoo! I'm coming! I don't want to follow such a mean administrator! I'm switching squads. I'm resigning!

t_ch: 风堇的话音未落，所有奇美拉都齐刷刷地站在了你们身后。
t_en: Before Hyacine finishes her sentence, all the chimeras are lined up nicely in front of you both.

t_ch: …不是。这群奇美拉怎么「嗷呜嗷呜」地全跑掉了？
t_en: ...Wait, why'd these chimeras run off "awoo-awoo"ing?

t_ch: 喂，你们当着我的面挖我的墙脚，想拆队是吧，这就是黄金裔的手段吗？
t_en: Hey, poaching my property in my presence, you trying to cause trouble for me? Is this how a Chrysos Heir does things?

t_ch: 奇美拉当然有跳槽的权利。
t_en: The chimeras of course have the right to change jobs.

t_ch: 这是用脚投票！
t_en: This is voting with your feet!

t_ch: 好啦。你仍然是管理员，但没有小奇美拉愿意继续待在你的队伍里。现在的结果，不是正符合你所坚持的*公正*嘛？
t_en: Pipe down. You may still be their administrator, but no chimeras are willing to stay on in your squad. From the looks of it, this is fitting of the "fairness" you so insist?

t_ch: 还是说，元老院只有在符合自身需要的时候，才会想要倾听大家的意愿？
t_en: Or does a Council Elder only listen to the will of the people when it suits his own needs?

t_ch: 这、这…我要去向花园投诉。你们滥用权势，欺压奥赫玛的公民！
t_en: Th—This... I'm lodging a complaint to the Garden. You're abusing your authority and oppressing the citizens of Okhema!

t_ch: 请吧。就是不清楚，在园丁们看来，与欺负小奇美拉相比，究竟谁的行为更过分呢？
t_en: Please do. I'm just not sure what could be worse than bullying the chimeras in the eyes of the Gardeners.

t_ch: 意思是，你连奇美拉都不如。
t_en: Which means, you're less than even a chimera.

t_ch: 我刚来就看见你在凶奇美拉！
t_en: I saw you being mean to the chimeras just now!

t_ch: 哎…行吧。我认了，是你们厉害，我斗不过。但别高兴得太早。
t_en: Bah... fine. I concede this round to you. But don't get all smug just yet.

t_ch: 我可以交出这群奇美拉的管理权，不过事情没这么简单。注意点，别把自己给赔进去了！
t_en: I can hand over the authority to these chimeras, but it won't be that simple. Just watch out before you end up losing everything!

t_ch: 呼…终于解决掉了。我算是明白阿格莱雅女士和元老院打交道时候的心情啦。
t_en: Phew... Finally settled. Now I know how it feels when Lady Aglaea interacts with the Council of Elders.

t_ch: 现在，这些小奇美拉就归我们管理了。至于后续安排，嗯…先去问问生命花园的园丁吧！
t_en: Now these little chimeras are ours to care for. As for later arrangements, hmm... Let's go ask the Gardeners in the Garden of Life!

t_ch: 我收到了权限转让的申请。所以，你们谁是这只奇美拉小队新的管理员？
t_en: I received a request to transfer authority. So who's the new administrator for this chimera squad?

t_ch: 正是在下。
t_en: I am.

t_ch: 没错，就是我旁边这位。
t_en: That would be this person beside me.

t_ch: 啊，灰宝，我想了想，要不管理员的位置还是交给你吧。
t_en: Ah, Grayie, I gave it some thought — how about you be their administrator?

t_ch: 正值逐火之旅重启，昏光庭院的工作也很繁忙，要是被阿格莱雅女士知道我在外面还揽了这些杂事，指不定又得生气啦。
t_en: Since the restart of the Flame-Chase Journey, it's also been busy at the Twilight Courtyard. If Lady Aglaea knew about my mucking around outside, she'd be pretty upset.

t_ch: 好，就由我来当这个管理员。
t_en: All right, I'll be the administrator then.

t_ch: 决定了？行。虽然很感谢你们的帮忙，但不得不说…你确实接下了个超级大的烂摊子。
t_en: It's decided? All right. I really should thank you for your help, but truth be told... you've really taken on a huge mess.

t_ch: 你来奥赫玛的时间不久，我就先做个说明吧。<color=#dbc291ff>这些奇美拉受生命花园的统一管理，分成若干个小队，会帮城里的居民做些简单的工作。</color>
t_en: You haven't been in Okhema long, so I'll just give you a brief explanation: <color=#dbc291ff>These chimeras are managed by the Garden of Life, and divided into smaller squads that help out this city's residents with simple tasks.</color>

t_ch: 大部分奇美拉都聚集在附近，你们可以随便看看。
t_en: Most chimeras gather nearby, so you can take a look around.

t_ch: 没有困难的工作，只有勇敢的奇美拉。加油！你可以的！
t_en: There's no job too hard, only courageous chimeras. Keep it up! You can do it!

t_ch: 我很能坚持的，坚持每天偷懒。
t_en: I will! I will keep slacking off every day.

t_ch: 就算是累趴下的奇美拉，只要想到奥赫玛的繁荣，也会不由自主地高昂起头！
t_en: Even if we work ourselves to the bone, we will hold our heads up high when we think about Okhema's prosperity!

t_ch: 早起的园丁有饭吃，早起的奇美拉只有苦吃。
t_en: The early Gardener gets breakfast, but the early chimera only gets broken fast.

t_ch: 瑟希斯啊，这群奇美拉都不用工作的吗？
t_en: O Cerces, do these chimeras not need to work?

t_ch: 呃…可能是近期要处理的工作太多，奇美拉都有些累，以前会更有精神的。
t_en: Err... Perhaps it's because there's been too much work recently. The chimeras must be overly fatigued. They used to be much more sprightly.

t_ch: 没事，我懂的。
t_en: It's fine. I get it.

t_ch: 太对了，这就是工作啊！
t_en: Absolutely right! This is their duty!

t_ch: 你们这剥削有点厉害…
t_en: You lot sure know how to exploit free labor...

t_ch: 咳，我继续说。<color=#dbc291ff>每只小队都有位登记在案的管理员，负责督察奇美拉的工作情况</color>…理解成监工之类的也行啦。
t_en: Ahem, I'll continue. <color=#dbc291ff>Each squad has a registered administrator charged with monitoring the chimeras' work situations</color>... Something like what a foreman does.

t_ch: 刚才那个很拽的人，就是这群奇美拉的管理员。
t_en: That pompous person just now is the administrator for this group of chimeras.

t_ch: 现在，它们的监工是我了。
t_en: Surveilling them is my job now.

t_ch: 当领导难道不好吗？
t_en: Isn't being a squad leader good?

t_ch: 嗯…事实是，这只奇美拉小队的工作成绩非常差，排名长期处于垫底状态。就算他没有把管理权转让给你们，队伍迟早也是要解散的。
t_en: Mm... Honestly, this squad's work output is very poor. Their performance has always ranked the lowest. Even if he didn't relinquish authority to you, the squad would've been disbanded sooner or later.

t_ch: 若是小队的成绩始终不达标，管理员不仅要支付一大笔罚金，还要…在公民大会上被通报批评——谁叫奇美拉是奥赫玛的代表物种呢？
t_en: If the squad still doesn't hit its targets, the administrator not only has to pay a hefty fine, they'll also be... issued a memo of criticism at the citizens' assembly. I mean, the chimera is Okhema's mascot, after all.

t_ch: 呀，通报批评…我在树庭求学的时候，都没有被那刻夏老师这么处罚过。对、对不起……
t_en: Ah, a memo of criticism... I was never punished so harshly by Professor Anaxa even when I was studying back at the Grove. S—Sorry...

t_ch: 太好了，我又要出名了！
t_en: Fantastic, I'm gonna be famous again!

t_ch: 灰宝！公民大会很恐怖的，要是惹他们不开心的话，甚至会被驱逐出奥赫玛的哦。
t_en: Grayie! The citizens' assembly is terrifying! If you upset them, you might even be driven out of Okhema.

t_ch: 别紧张，我也会帮忙的…真、真没做好的话，我来替你挨训！
t_en: Calm down. I'll help too... I—If they don't do a good job, I'll take the punishment in your place!

t_ch: 别怕，我会拯救这一切。
t_en: Don't worry. I'll salvage everything.

t_ch: 嗯，灰宝也别紧张，我会帮忙的…要是真、真没做好的话，我来替你挨训！
t_en: Hmm, you calm down too, Grayie. I'll help out... If they don't do a g—good job, I'll take the punishment in your place!

t_ch: 现在说这些也没意义，你们还是<color=#dbc291ff>想想该怎么提高小队的工作成绩吧。</color>得先定个小目标……
t_en: It's pointless to say all this now. You guys better <color=#dbc291ff>think about how to increase the squad's work performance. </color>A mini milestone has to be assigned...

t_ch: 这样，我带你们去看看目前奇美拉小队的排名情况。
t_en: How about this? I'll bring you all to see the current squad rankings.

t_ch: ——提前完成！好棒！灰宝，还有小奇美拉们都很厉害！
t_en: ...Completed ahead of time! Well done! Grayie and the chimeras are wonderful!

t_ch: 距离最终期限还有不少时间，大家一起去放松下吧！嗯…去集市转转，给灰宝和小奇美拉买些好吃的，然后舒舒服服地泡个澡~走吧走吧！
t_en: There's still some time before the deadline. Let's all take a breather! Mm... You can go walk around the shops and buy something delicious for Grayie and the chimeras, then soak in a comfy bath! Let's go, let's go!

t_ch: 被表扬了！下班~好吃的~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: I was praised! Time to clock off! Good food, warm bath, so happy! Awoo-awoo!

t_ch: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
t_en: With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...

t_ch: 好险，差点就没完成…不过已经很厉害了，灰宝，还有小奇美拉们都辛苦啦。
t_en: That was close. We almost didn't make it... But Grayie and the chimeras have all worked hard for this.

t_ch: 现在就把工作全都丢到一旁，好好地放松下！…去泡个澡？劳逸结合才能保持健康哦。
t_en: Now to toss work aside, kick back and relax! ...How 'bout a bath? A good work-life balance is how one stays healthy!

t_ch: 被表扬了！下班~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: I was praised! Time to clock off! Get a warm bath in, so happy! Awoo-awoo!

t_ch: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在浴池里舒服地泡着澡，尽情放松了片刻……
t_en: You and Hyacine bring the chimeras to the bath to indulge in a relaxing time...

t_ch: …不行了，不行了…累死了，实在做不动了…怎么还有这么多啊……
t_en: ...I, I can't do this anymore... Too tired to move... Why're there still so many...

t_ch: 小奇美拉们持续工作了好久，这才总算完成了目标……
t_en: The chimeras toil away for a long time, finally finishing the job...

t_ch: 不错。你达到了设立的目标，奇美拉小队暂时不会解散，可以安心了。
t_en: Not bad, you met your designated milestone. The chimera squad won't disband for now, so you all can rest easy.

t_ch: …说实话，我还真为你捏了把汗。能让这几只奇美拉好好干活可不容易，尤其是合作，你有什么管理的经验或是秘诀么，让我也学学吧。
t_en: ...Honestly, it was cutting it REALLY close there. It's not easy to whip these chimeras into shape, especially when it comes to teamwork. Mind imparting any management experience or secrets to me?

t_ch: 这是商业秘密。
t_en: This is a trade secret.

t_ch: 奇美拉的合理搭配是获胜关键。
t_en: The key to victory lies in the strategic synergy of the chimeras.

t_ch: 嗯…好吧。现在你们是合格的小队了，该想想后面的打算，争取更高的名次，或是停留在舒适区里都行。不过，首先你得给队伍改个名字。
t_en: Hmm... all right. You're a qualified squad now, so you need to consider what to do going forward — achieve a higher ranking, or stay stagnant where you are in the comfort zone. But, you have to name your squad first.

t_ch: 取名…看似简简单单的几个字，却足以让最富有智慧的诗人焦头烂额。你望向站在身旁的风堇，以及还在嗷嗷叫的奇美拉们，心中终于有了答案。
t_en: A name... may seem like a few simple letters, but it most certainly vexes even the most prolific of poets. You glance over at Hyacine standing beside you, then on the still-crowing chimeras, and the answer dawns upon you.

t_ch: 我的队伍，名字就叫做——
t_en: My squad's name is...

t_ch: 「开拓者说的都队」
t_en: "The Squad Mentioned by the Trailblazer"

t_ch: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
t_en: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

t_ch: 我决定了！
t_en: I've decided!

t_ch: 还是再想想吧…
t_en: Best to think it over...

t_ch: 「风堇亲卫队」
t_en: "Hyacine's Royal Guard"

t_ch: 呀，这样会不会太直接啦……
t_en: Ah, might this be too straightforward...

t_ch: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
t_en: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

t_ch: 我决定了！
t_en: I've decided!

t_ch: 还是再想想吧…
t_en: Best to think it over...

t_ch: 「奇美拉施工队」
t_en: "Chimera Operation Team"

t_ch: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
t_en: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

t_ch: 我决定了！
t_en: I've decided!

t_ch: 还是再想想吧…
t_en: Best to think it over...

t_ch: 「无名部队」
t_en: "Nameless Army"

t_ch: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
t_en: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

t_ch: 我决定了！
t_en: I've decided!

t_ch: 还是再想想吧…
t_en: Best to think it over...

t_ch: 「自定义小队1」
t_en: "Custom Team 1"

t_ch: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
t_en: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

t_ch: 我决定了！
t_en: I've decided!

t_ch: 还是再想想吧…
t_en: Best to think it over...

t_ch: ——「{TEXTJOIN#215}」！这就是我们队伍的新名字嗷呜！
t_en: ...{TEXTJOIN#215}! This is our squad's new name, awoo!

t_ch: 虽然早就听说灰宝的趣味有些…独特，但这个队名还是给了我不小的震撼呢。
t_en: I've heard that Grayie's tastes are a little... peculiar, but this squad name still got me a little startled.

t_ch: 打扰了。我看到排名榜上有支队伍的成绩突飞猛进，请问，你就是它们的管理员吗？
t_en: Sorry to bother you. I saw this squad's ranking rise in leaps and bounds on the leaderboard. Might I ask if you're their administrator?

t_ch: 现在真是我了。
t_en: It actually IS me this time.

t_ch: 没错，你要和我签订契约吗？
t_en: That's right. You want to sign a contract with me?

t_ch: 您好。或许有些冒昧，但…请允许我加入您的队伍。
t_en: Hello. This may sound a little forward, but... please allow me to join your squad.

t_ch: 咦，是因为队伍的表现太过出色，所以吸引了其他小奇美拉来加入吗？
t_en: Hmm, do other chimeras wish to join because of your squad's stellar performance?

t_ch: 正是如此。我的称号是「职业经理」，拥有极其丰富的工作经验，在实践中也沉淀了一套属于自己的方法论，与许多不同的奇美拉合作过，尤其擅长团队协同。
t_en: That is correct. My title is "professional manager," and I have ample work experience, having developed my own unique methodology in the practical arena. I've also worked with different chimeras before, especially excelling at teamwork coordination.

t_ch: 优秀的奇美拉，需要一位更优秀的管理员才能得到充分发挥。而我相信，在您的带领下，我能完全施展自己的才干，提升队伍成绩，进而实现双赢。
t_en: Superb chimeras need an even more outstanding administrator to fully wield their potential. And I believe that with your leadership, I can fully demonstrate my own talents and raise the squad's performance for a win-win partnership.

t_ch: 呃，灰宝…这只小奇美拉，是不是有点不太一样？
t_en: Err, Grayie... Doesn't this chimera look a little different?

t_ch: 即便在奇美拉当中，也有因能力差别而产生的定位划分。有的奇美拉适合实际工作，有的奇美拉则可以站在高位，着眼全局，发挥带头作用。
t_en: Even among chimeras, they are divided according to their capabilities. Some chimeras are more suited for practical work, while others can survey the bigger picture from an elevated position and utilize their leadership skills.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>领队奇美拉</color>——这便是人们对我的称呼，但我并不喜欢。奇美拉是团结的整体，不该再被*人为*地划分出等级高低。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Alpha Chimera</color> — that's what people call me, though I dislike it. Chimeras are a unity of their lesser selves, and should not be artificially segregated into hierarchies of ability.

t_ch: 你好像会说些很厉害的话。
t_en: You sound like you know really big words.

t_ch: 查看能力值都不行吗？
t_en: Can't we just be checking on ability scores?

t_ch: 我也同意！要是因为能力高低而区别对待小奇美拉，就和先前那个议员没什么两样了。
t_en: I agree as well! If we gave differential treatment to chimeras based on their abilities, we'd be just as feckless as that Elder.
...Heh.

t_ch: 谈话间，你似乎看到这只自称为领队的奇美拉，嘴角露出了难以察觉的笑容。
t_en: In the midst of the conversation, you seem to notice a barely perceptible smile flash across this self-proclaimed Alpha Chimera.

t_ch: 无论如何，预祝我们的合作顺利，事业成功。
t_en: Regardless, let our collaboration be smooth and our endeavors successful.

t_ch: 等等等等——喂喂，明明是我先来的啊！
t_en: Wait wait wait! Hey hey, I was here first!

t_ch: 喂…为什么啊？我邀请了你这么多次，亲自跑了不下三回，你都不肯加入我的小队。
t_en: Hey... Why? I tried inviting you so many times personally, but you refused to join me.

t_ch: 凭什么这个新来的能排在我前面，就因为{F#她}{M#他}和黄金裔的关系好？还是有什么不能让我知道的原因，倒是说说看啊。
t_en: Why should this newcomer get ahead of me, just because {F#she's}{M#he's} on good terms with the Chrysos Heirs? Or is there some reason that I'm not privy to? I'd like to hear 'em.

t_ch: 因为，{F#她}{M#他}比你有价值。
t_en: Because, {F#she}{M#he} is more valuable than you.

t_ch: 哎，别「嗷呜」了，我也听不懂，但有件事很确定啊…就是你加入的这支队伍不过是群乌合之众。才刚组建起来，跟着{F#她}{M#他}能有什么前途？
t_en: *sigh* Stop awoo-ing. I don't understand you either, though I'm sure of one thing... This squad you joined comprises nothing but misfits. What future could there be, following {F#her}{M#him} with a newly formed squad?

t_ch: 这话我可不能当作没听见啊。
t_en: I just can't pretend I didn't hear that.

t_ch: …听见又怎么样？我就是故意说给你听的。
t_en: ...And so what if you did? I deliberately said it for you to hear.

t_ch: 造谣是要负责任的！
t_en: Slander comes with consequences!

t_ch: 哈，我都当了好久的管理员，你这队伍到底是个啥样，我还不清楚吗？
t_en: Ha, I've been an administrator for so long. You think I wouldn't know what your squad is like?

t_ch: 怎么，不服气？等你的排名超过我再来反驳吧，勉勉强强才达标，哟，还装起来了？
t_en: What, did I upset you? You can back up your words when your rank is higher than mine. You hardly even managed to hit your targets, and you're here strutting your stuff?

t_ch: 没问题。那就来打个赌。我相信{F#她}{M#他}带领的队伍，绝对能击败你。
t_en: No problem, let's make it a bet then. I believe that {F#her}{M#his} squad will beat yours for sure.

t_ch: 不用害怕挑衅。就把他的队伍设为下阶段的目标，我会帮你获胜。
t_en: Don't be afraid of his taunts. Just treat his squad as the next objective, and I'll help you hit it.

t_ch: 等等，你怎么替我决定了？
t_en: Hang on. Why're you deciding for me?

t_ch: 该继续北伐了！
t_en: The time for conquest is nigh!

t_ch: 行啊。你就留在那个垃圾队伍里，浪费时间和精力，然后心悦诚服地被我踩在脚下吧！
t_en: Hah, sure. You stay in that trash squad and waste your time and energy. Only then will you be convincingly crushed underfoot by me!

t_ch: 三周内，让我们见见真章——
t_en: Three weeks, then we'll see who truly stands above the other...

t_ch: 提前完成！灰宝和小奇美拉都辛苦了，待会给你们买点好吃的~
t_en: Done in advance! Good job, Grayie and chimeras. I'll buy some delicious food for you guys later!

t_ch: 做得不错。我果然没有看错人。
t_en: Well done. I knew I didn't get the wrong person.

t_ch: 复盘的事就留到后面再说，现在是庆功时间！按照惯例，大家一起去集市逛逛，然后开开心心地泡个澡~走吧走吧！
t_en: We'll leave the postmortem for later. It's time to celebrate! According to tradition, everyone will head to the market together for a nice, relaxing bath. Let's go, let's go!

t_ch: 喜欢小风堇，喜欢夸夸！好吃的~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: I love Cinny, I love praise! Yummy food, toasty bath, happy me! Awoo-awoo!

t_ch: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
t_en: With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...

t_ch: 有惊无险，差点就没完成…灰宝和小奇美拉都辛苦啦，做得很不错哦。
t_en: That was really close. We almost didn't make it in time... You've worked hard, Grayie and chimeras. Decent job.

t_ch: 没想到会如此胶着，或许得重新审视……
t_en: I wasn't expecting it to be so tight. Perhaps it's time for us to reassess our processes...

t_ch: 趁还有点时间，大家一起去泡个澡吧。充分休息才能用最好的状态迎接工作。走吧走吧！
t_en: While there's still a little time left, we should all go take a bath. A good rest is essential for an optimal work state. Let's go, let's go!

t_ch: 这个活就干到这里！泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: That's it for work! Bath time, happy! Awoo-awoo!

t_ch: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在浴池里舒服地泡着澡，尽情放松了片刻……
t_en: You and Hyacine bring the chimeras to the bath to indulge in a relaxing time...

t_ch: 你们队伍的名次居然比我高？…真的假的？莫不是我最近浴盐用太多，出现幻觉了吧？
t_en: Your squad's placed higher than me? ...Is this real? Am I hallucinating from all my recent salt baths?

t_ch: 喂，确定花园的工作量统计没出错？塔兰顿在看着你，所以麻烦上点心，负责任地帮我再检查一遍——我的队伍，完成的工作，比他们少？
t_en: Hey, you sure the Garden didn't tally our workload wrong? Talanton's watching from above, so please be more meticulous about your evaluations and help re-verify the results more responsibly — did my squad really do less work than theirs?

t_ch: 对。还不愿意相信的话，我把这张排名表贴到你常泡的浴池墙上如何？让所有来往的客人都看看，一个无能的管理员是怎么毁掉整支队伍的。
t_en: That is correct. If it's still hardly believable to you, how about I paste this leaderboard list on the wall where you regularly soak in your bath? All guests will be able to witness how an incapable administrator destroys their own squad.

t_ch: 花园会密切关注每只奇美拉的情况，所以别以为我们不知道——看看这个，你队伍里的奇美拉提交的工作日报，不会要说是伪造的吧？
t_en: The Garden keeps a close eye on each chimera's status, so don't think we're oblivious to the situation. Look at this: Your chimera squad's submitted daily work reports — you telling me these are forgeries?

t_ch: 日报，好可怕…是不是我们平时的言行，也会被小奇美拉报告给园丁呀。
t_en: Daily reports, how scary... You think our daily exchanges are also being reported by the chimeras to the Gardeners?

t_ch: 要是泡澡也有对应的神明的话，你绝对当之无愧。还有什么话想说吗，洗浴之泰坦？
t_en: If there was a god for the bath, you'd definitely be it. Anything else you would like to add, Bath Titan?

t_ch: 这是亵渎律法！奥赫玛公民享有正当的泡澡权利，这点在云石天宫的介绍里也有记录。再说，我是队伍的管理员，我做什么，轮得到它们来指点吗？
t_en: This is an affront to justice! Okheman citizens have the rightful privilege to their baths. This is also recorded in the Marmoreal Palace's introduction. Besides, I'm a squad administrator — what right do they have to criticize what I do?

t_ch: 要不是这群东西的工作效率太低，我会输吗？是花园分配的奇美拉有问题好吧！
t_en: If not for the atrocious work efficiency of this lot, you think I would've lost? This is the Garden's problem with how they assign chimeras!

t_ch: 但你的队伍名次目前岌岌可危，再不做点什么，就要面临解散了。提前准备好罚金吧。
t_en: But your squad's ranking is currently tanking. If you don't do something soon, they'll soon face disbandment. You'd better prep to pay a fine soon.

t_ch: 我可以帮你打保级赛。
t_en: I can help you fight a demotion prevention match.

t_ch: 诚信接单，包过。
t_en: I'll guarantee a sure win for you, hand to heart.

t_ch: 我早就说，{F#她}{M#他}管理的队伍绝对能击败你。我不会接受邀约，请回吧。
t_en: I already said before that {F#her}{M#his} squad will surely defeat yours. I'm afraid I'll have to decline your invitation. Please return.

t_ch: …不就是只奇美拉吗，我还不稀罕！我退出，我不玩了，你们自个去卷吧！
t_en: ...Bah, they're just some chimeras, think I would care? I'm out, done! You lot can compete amongst yourselves!

t_ch: 想要单方面解除管理权限，请随我来这边，并支付相应的罚金。走吧。
t_en: If you wish to unilaterally revoke management privileges, please come with me and pay the respective fine. Let's go.

t_ch: 明明自己总在偷懒，还把工作都丢给小奇美拉。遇上这种不负责的管理员也挺难受的。
t_en: You're obviously slacking off yourself and stacking all the workload on the chimeras. It's probably tough having to deal with such an irresponsible administrator.

t_ch: 但是…虽然获胜了是好事，不知道为什么，我总觉得什么地方有点奇怪。
t_en: But... it's a good thing we won, but I don't know why I still feel weird about it.

t_ch: 难度太简单了？
t_en: Because it was too easy?

t_ch: 应该不是。小奇美拉的工作很辛苦，算不上是简单……
t_en: I don't think so. The chimeras worked so hard, so I can't say it was easy...

t_ch: 我的表现太强了？
t_en: I stole the limelight?

t_ch: 应该不是。啊，我知道灰宝作为天外来客的实力很强，但奇怪的不是这方面……
t_en: I don't think so. I know your strength as a traveler from beyond the sky, but that's not why this is weird...

t_ch: 那个人为什么要来挑衅？
t_en: Why is that person here to provoke you?

t_ch: 对！就是这个。这位浴场的常客，和那个议员对待我们的态度极其相近。元老院或许确实看黄金裔不顺眼，但他没有理由针对我们。
t_en: Yes! That's it. This bath regular and that Elder treated us in overly similar ways. The Council may not see eye to eye with the Chrysos Heirs, but that's no reason to have a grudge against us.

t_ch: 是不是还有什么隐情呢……
t_en: Could there be something more that meets the eye...

t_ch: 花园布置的工作太多了？
t_en: The Garden's assigning too much work?

t_ch: 应该不是。近期奥赫玛要处理的事情确实很多，只能辛苦小奇美拉了……
t_en: Probably not. There've been plenty of happenings that needed to be settled in Okhema, but that's just more effort on the chimeras' part...

t_ch: 与其思考这些毫无根据的事，两位不如多花点心思在团队建设上。
t_en: Rather than dwelling on unfounded matters, why not spare that time to build a better squad instead?

t_ch: 说的也是。这次多亏了你帮忙啦。有了领队后，小奇美拉工作时的状态都完全不一样了。
t_en: You're right. Your help has been much appreciated this time. The chimeras' work mentality has been a complete about-turn with a leader guiding them.

t_ch: 领队奇美拉的重要性不言而喻，不过在欢庆之余，您应该多关注那些实际参与工作的奇美拉，它们才是团队的基础。
t_en: The essentiality of an Alpha Chimera speaks for itself, but in the midst of celebration, you should focus more on the chimeras that are actually doing the work. They are the foundation of a successful squad.

t_ch: 在近期工作中，我听到了些异样的声音。有空的话，您可以详细观察。
t_en: During my recent work stints, I heard some unusual sounds. You should investigate when you're free.

t_ch: 吹会风，让心情彻底放空——
t_en: Enjoy the breeze a little and empty your mind...

t_ch: 我决定了，明天要牙痛，失眠也可以。总之不工作。
t_en: I've decided: I'm having a toothache tomorrow, or even getting insomnia. I'm not going to work, in any case.

t_ch: 在生命花园打工，哪有不疯的，都是硬撑罢了。
t_en: Who has gone mad working in the Garden of Life? We're all just hanging by a thread.

t_ch: 你知道的，{NICKNAME}是我的领导，这家伙强得不可思议。
t_en: You know, {NICKNAME} is my boss. That one is incredibly strong.

t_ch: 而我，是队伍的元老，没有功劳也有苦劳。谁惹我，就让谁滚蛋！
t_en: And I, as a veteran of the squad, have endured my fair share of hardships. Whoever crosses me can get the heck out of my sight!

t_ch: 呀，因为最近的进展太过顺利，小奇美拉们开始有些松懈了。灰宝，得想想办法。
t_en: Hmm, it's been too smooth sailing recently. The chimeras have started getting complacent. Grayie, we have to think of something.

t_ch: 通报批评！
t_en: A memo of criticism!

t_ch: 可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
t_en: But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.

t_ch: 扣它们的绩效！
t_en: Dock their pay!

t_ch: 可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
t_en: But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.

t_ch: 该进行团队换血了！
t_en: It's time for some new blood in this squad!

t_ch: 可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
t_en: But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.

t_ch: 我亲自去和它们聊聊。
t_en: I will speak to them personally.

t_ch: 嗯，都工作了这么长时间，是该好好和小奇美拉们交流下了。
t_en: Mm, it's been a while since we've worked together. High time we had a chat with the chimeras.

t_ch: 这样。我们管理层内部先讨论好解决方案，再去找出问题的奇美拉谈话。
t_en: How about this: Let's discuss the solution among management first, then approach the problem chimeras for a chat.

t_ch: 你们商量了好久，才总算制定了谈话要点……
t_en: You all discuss for a long time before finally settling on the key points...

t_ch: 咳。自从灰宝接手以来，我们团队取得了长足的进步。能克服诸多困境，接连击败对手，获得如此成绩，当然离不开各位的努力。先表示感谢~
t_en: Ahem, ever since Grayie took the reins, our squad has seen excellent progress. To have overcome a multitude of difficulties and defeated a string of competitors, these results wouldn't have been possible without everyone's hard work. I'd like to first express my appreciation!

t_ch: 鼓掌——
t_en: *applause*

t_ch: 但是，我们必须看到，随着团队规模的扩大，竞争水平的提升，面对的问题也越发复杂。这也要求我们进一步提高工作能力，保持更积极的工作状态……
t_en: But, we must be able to realize that with the expansion of the squad, so will the rise in the competitive benchmark, as well as the increasing complexity of the challenges we face. This also requires us to take further steps to improve our work capabilities and maintain an even more proactive work attitude...

t_ch: …嗷呜？我的工作已经很饱和，没法再增加了。
t_en: ...Awoo? I'm pretty loaded up on work already. No need to add some more.

t_ch: 我们团队的情况，你又不是不知道。很难的嗷呜。
t_en: It's not like you don't know our squad's situation. It's tough on us, awoo.

t_ch: 你说的这个啊，我都明白，但是呢，做不了。至于为什么做不了…你瞧瞧现在的成员数量，够吗？提产能是要靠人手的，光吹是没用的。
t_en: I get what you're saying, but we can't do that. As for why not... Just take a look at how many we have in the squad, are we enough? Increasing workload relies on increased headcount — it's not just all hot air.

t_ch: 不够的话，就得再招点奇美拉过来。但那就不是我该考虑的事了，对吧？
t_en: We'll have to recruit more chimeras if we've more work. But that's something above my pay grade, I think?

t_ch: 唔…灰宝！
t_en: Oo-er... Grayie!

t_ch: 好吧，作为管理者，和员工进行绩效谈话是你的职责。想想看，到底该说些什么呢？
t_en: All right, as the administrator, speaking to your staff about their performances is your duty. Think, what should you say?

t_ch: （先吓唬它们）
t_en: (Scare them a little first)

t_ch: 说实话，现在的成绩还远远没有达到我的预期。你们都知道，生命花园里的奇美拉有很多，想加入我们队伍的呢，也有很多。
t_en: Truth be told, our current performance is way below my expectations. You all know that there are many chimeras in the Garden of Life. There are also many that want to join our squad.

t_ch: 仅统计昨日收到的入队申请，就已经有<unbreak>12</unbreak>次了。
t_en: Just counting the squad applications received yesterday, I already count <unbreak>12</unbreak>.

t_ch: 正好，园丁小姐也在问，是否需要派些更厉害的奇美拉来支援我们。
t_en: And it's been good timing that Miss Gardener has also been asking us if she needs to dispatch stronger chimeras our way.

t_ch: 这样的话，成员的数量会不会太多了些…有点苦恼呀。
t_en: If that's the case, wouldn't the number of members be a little... troublesome?

t_ch: 如果你们想留在这里，我很欢迎。要是有其他的想法呢，我也不会阻拦。
t_en: You're more than welcome to stay here. If you have other ideas, I won't stop you either.

t_ch: 嗷呜……
t_en: Awoo...

t_ch: （再安抚它们）
t_en: (Placate them now)

t_ch: 当然，我们已经合作了很长时间，彼此间都是有信任在的。各位的工作能力呢，我也看在眼里，很出色，符合团队的要求。
t_en: Of course, we've been working together for a while, so there's trust built between us. I'm also aware of everyone's abilities — outstanding and a great fit for the squad's needs.

t_ch: 除非不得已，我也不想对团队进行换血。重新磨合很麻烦，对吧？
t_en: I don't wish to change up the squad either, only as a last resort. It's arduous to have to cohere with new members, is it not?

t_ch: …对的。我们也觉得嗷呜。
t_en: ...Yes, we think so too, awoo.

t_ch: 你们可以做选择，但需要想清楚代价，不是每次，都能有后悔的机会。
t_en: You all have to make a choice, but also be aware of its cost — one doesn't always get a chance to regret one's decision.

t_ch: （换套别的话术试试）
t_en: (Try a different approach)

t_ch: （先安抚它们）
t_en: (Placate them first)

t_ch: 哎呀，都别紧张，今天叫大家过来，就是随便聊聊，没什么大事。
t_en: Gosh, no need to be anxious. The reason I gathered everyone today is just to have a casual chat. It's nothing major.

t_ch: 我们队伍组建已经有段时间了，成绩也很不错，各位都是最初就在团队里的资深成员，你们的付出自然不该被忽视，必须好好奖励才行。
t_en: Our squad has been formed for a while, and we've achieved great results. Everyone here has been with the squad since the start. Your contributions will not go unnoticed, and they must be rewarded.

t_ch: 嗷呜，这是我们的工作。
t_en: Awoo, it's our job.

t_ch: （再吓唬它们）
t_en: (Scare them a little now)

t_ch: 正好，生命花园的园丁最近也在问，是否需要派些更厉害的奇美拉来支援。
t_en: It's good timing that the Gardeners have recently asked if we need stronger chimeras to assist us.

t_ch: 我想，你们忙碌了挺长的时间，是该好好休息了。
t_en: I've been thinking of letting you guys take a much-needed break after being busy for so long.
...Awoo?

t_ch: 希望加入队伍的奇美拉也有许多，仅昨日就收到了<unbreak>12</unbreak>份申请。
t_en: There are many chimeras that're also hoping to join the squad. Just yesterday, we've already had <unbreak>12</unbreak> applications.

t_ch: 呀，这样的话，成员数量会不会有点太多了，灰宝管理起来也很费劲呢。
t_en: Ah, if that's the case, wouldn't we have too many members? It's also going to be hard on you, Grayie.

t_ch: 从长远发展来看，适时对团队做调整还是挺有必要的。精简成员，剔除不需要的部分，吸纳新鲜血液，这才是正确的做法，对吧？
t_en: From a long-term strategic perspective, it's essential to make timely adjustments to the squad. Streamlining, pruning inefficiencies, and bringing in new blood, that's the right way to go about it, no?

t_ch: 作为团队资深成员，你们应当发挥表率作用。明白我的意思吗？
t_en: As veteran squad members, you should all try to set an example as well. You understand what I'm saying?

t_ch: （换套别的话术试试）
t_en: (Try a different approach)

t_ch: 嗷呜……
t_en: Awoo...

t_ch: 嗯…我同意您的看法，完全同意嗷呜…没有任何意见。
t_en: Mm... I agree with you, I totally do, awooo... I have no objections.

t_ch: 竞争愈发激烈，要想获得更高的团队名次，就需要全部成员的共同努力……
t_en: Competition's getting stiff, so if we want to achieve a higher squad ranking, everyone has to work together towards that goal...

t_ch: 嗷呜，我们很清楚这个道理，会认真按您的要求去做的…会的……
t_en: Awooo, we're crystal clear on what that means. We will earnestly meet your expectations... we will...

t_ch: 没想到小奇美拉的心思会有这么多，看起来很听话的样子，心底却埋着不少事。
t_en: I never thought chimeras to be so thoughtful. They look outwardly obedient, but harbor many emotions inside.

t_ch: 以后和它们打交道的时候，灰宝得多留个心眼才行。
t_en: Grayie, you should be more careful talking to them in the future.

t_ch: 我乐在其中。
t_en: I revel in this.

t_ch: 是这样吗？以后哪天要是小伊卡闹脾气的时候，也要麻烦灰宝来安抚它啦。
t_en: Is that so? If Little Ica ever throws a fit next time, I'll get you to cajole it as well.

t_ch: 欲戴王冠，必承其重。
t_en: Heavy is the head that wears the crown.

t_ch: …王冠？对哦，灰宝是阿格莱雅女士的贵客，这点小事当然难不倒你！
t_en: ...Crown? Oh right, Grayie is Lady Aglaea's esteemed guest. I'm sure such a trivial matter is nothing to you!

t_ch: 既然团队的问题都解决了，现在该继续认真工作啦。让我看看，下个目标是……
t_en: Now that the squad's issue has been resolved, we can focus on working hard. Let's see, our next goal is...

t_ch: 很抱歉，我想暂时休息一段时间。
t_en: Sorry, I'd like to take some time off.

t_ch: 你打算跳槽了吗？
t_en: You thinking of jumping ship?

t_ch: 别走，我给你涨工资。
t_en: Don't go. I'll raise your pay.

t_ch: 并非如此。对处在扩张期的队伍而言，团队成员的储备很重要。
t_en: Nothing of the sort. Having a reserve of squad members is imperative to expanding a squad.

t_ch: 如果我始终占据领队位置，其余成员将永远无法得到成长。后退，是为了共同前进。
t_en: If I continue to hog the leader role, the other members will never be able to grow. Taking a step back is so that everyone can move forward.

t_ch: 但要是你离开了，该由哪只小奇美拉担任领队呢？
t_en: But if you leave, which chimera will take the lead?

t_ch: 不必担心，我都安排好了。在收到的入队申请中，我筛选出了最适合的对象。
t_en: Don't worry. I've already made arrangements. I've filtered out the best candidate after receiving the applications.

t_ch: 往后，将由它来接替领队的职责，相信不会让您失望。那么，祝您的事业顺利。
t_en: In the future, it will bear the responsibility of leading the squad. I trust you won't be disappointed. Then, I wish you a successful career.

t_ch: 职业经理踩着欢快的步伐离开了，围观的奇美拉都露出了羡慕的神色。
t_en: The professional manager departs with a light-hearted skip, the onlooking chimeras casting envious stares.

t_ch: 嗷呜…果然，最快乐的时刻，就是提离职的那一刻。
t_en: Awoo... So the happiest moment is indeed tendering your resignation.

t_ch: 它走得好决绝。
t_en: It left with such resolution.

t_ch: 它好开心的样子…
t_en: It looked really happy...

t_ch: 我能不能也放个假？
t_en: Can I take some time off too?

t_ch: 还有好多工作等着我们去做，灰宝可不能松懈！继续努力提升小队的名次吧。
t_en: There's plenty more work waiting for us. You can't slow down now, Grayie! We have to keep gunning for a higher squad rank.

t_ch: 得定个目标，嗯…这次就把<color=#dbc291ff>第二名的队伍</color>作为我们的对手吧！
t_en: Got to set a target, hmm... Let's have the <color=#dbc291ff>second-ranked squad</color> be our opponents this time!

t_ch: …第二名的队伍发生了变化？好厉害，突然就蹿了上去，已经超过我们了。
t_en: ...The squad in second place has changed? Impressive, they came out of nowhere and overtook us.

t_ch: 灰宝，我们去园丁那儿问问情况吧！
t_en: Grayie, let's go to the Gardener and ask about the situation.

t_ch: 小风堇，还有小灰。你们好呀。
t_en: Cinny, and Little Gray. Hello to the both of you.

t_ch: 唔…这么关注排名榜，莫非，你们也在陪小奇美拉玩吗？
t_en: Hmm... Paying so much attention to the rankings, are you guys playing with the chimeras too?

t_ch: ——缇宝老师？！啊，对不起，我们是不是打扰到了……
t_en: Tribbie? Ah, I'm sorry. Did we disturb you...

t_ch: 没关系的，小风堇。缇安原先就很喜欢这群小家伙，经常来花园找它们玩。
t_en: It's alright, Cinny. Trianne has always loved these little ones, often coming to the garden to play with them.

t_ch: 所以，你们也是小奇美拉的管理员吗？
t_en: So, are you guys also administrators for the chimeras?

t_ch: 嗯，灰宝接手了这支队伍，正在认真工作呢，我也会帮些忙。
t_en: Yeah, Grayie just took over this squad and is working hard on it. I'm also helping out.

t_ch: 等等，缇宝老师说*也*，难道……
t_en: Hang on, Tribbie said "also." Does that mean...

t_ch: 哼哼哼——揭晓答案！小风堇肯定想不到，*我们*就是「花花」的管理员哦。
t_en: Huhuhu! Revealing the answer now! Cinny, you definitely did not expect it, but we are Florie's administrator!

t_ch: 我早就猜到了！
t_en: I knew it!

t_ch: 灰宝！明明你刚才还和我一样惊讶，这种时候就别逞强啦！
t_en: Grayie! You were just as surprised as I was earlier. Stop pretending!

t_ch: 你藏得可真够深啊？
t_en: You really hid it well, huh.

t_ch: 这么说来，那只小队的标志，确实是缇宝老师的图案。我应该早点察觉到的。
t_en: Come to think of it, that squad's insignia is indeed Tribbie's design. I should have noticed it sooner.

t_ch: 正好，小灰，还有小风堇，这么受小奇美拉欢迎的话，我们来玩个游戏吧。
t_en: Perfect! Since Little Gray and Cinny are so popular among the chimeras, let's play a game.

t_ch: ——看看在这个周期内，谁的小队能取得更高的名次呢？
t_en: Let's see whose squad can achieve a higher ranking this season!

t_ch: 行呀，缇宝老师主动提出要较量，我们当然会接受。
t_en: Sure, since Tribbie is the one who is challenging us, we'll accept the challenge!

t_ch: 灰宝作为管理员，也来说点什么吧。虽然要和超级强的缇宝老师比赛，但气势上不能输！
t_en: Grayie, you should say something too as their administrator. We may be competing against the overpowered Tribbie, but that's no reason to lose out in spirit!

t_ch: 会赢的！
t_en: We'll win for sure!

t_ch: 我已经在研究决赛的对手了。
t_en: I have been studying our opponents for the final match.

t_ch: 到时候可别哭鼻子哦？
t_en: You better not be bawling later on, 'kay?

t_ch: 太、太失礼啦！灰宝，对缇宝老师要尊重点。但我们…嗯，我们不会输的！
t_en: H—How rude! Grayie, you need to be more respectful to Tribbie. But we... yes, we won't lose!

t_ch: *我们*知道的，小灰爱说大话，所以不怕。都要加油哦。
t_en: We know that Little Gray loves to brag, so we're not bothered. Let's all do our best.

t_ch: 轻轻松松~距离最终期限还有好多时间，灰宝带着小奇美拉去尽情放松下吧！
t_en: Easy breezy! There's still plenty of time before the deadline. Grayie, you should take the chimeras out to relax for a bit!

t_ch: 嗷呜！提前下班~开心~可以玩~嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo! Getting off work early, so happy! We can go play, awoo-awoo!

t_ch: 完成~大家辛苦啦，灰宝和小奇美拉都好好休息下吧~
t_en: All done! Good work, everyone. Grayie and the chimeras can go relax now!

t_ch: 嗷呜！下班~开心~嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo! Work is done, so happy! Awoo-awoo!

t_ch: …嗷呜。小风堇在休息吗？
t_en: ...Awoo. Is Cinny resting?

t_ch: 是呀，这里距离天空很近。看看云，吹吹风，让思绪在阳光中飘散，心情会舒畅很多。
t_en: Yes, this place is very close to the sky. Gazing at clouds, basking in the wind, letting your thoughts drift through the sunlight — your mood will turn out much better.

t_ch: 那我来帮你放松下嗷呜~
t_en: Let me help you relax then, awoo!

t_ch: 也帮帮我吧。
t_en: Help me too.

t_ch: 我已经下班了，有新需求请找我的同伴嗷呜。
t_en: I'm off duty. Please look for my buddies if you have any new requests, awoo.

t_ch: 不好好工作，在这偷懒是吧？
t_en: Not working hard, but hardly working here?

t_ch: 现在是下班时间。按照花园的规定，加班要付双倍的酬劳嗷呜！
t_en: I'm off-duty. According to the Garden's regulations, overtime requires double the compensation, awoo!

t_ch: 嗯？灰宝已经休息好啦？还觉得疲惫的话，我可以帮你疗愈哦。
t_en: Hmm? You're all done taking a break? I can help you loosen up if you're still feeling tired.

t_ch: 话说，你当了这么长时间的管理员，也和许多小奇美拉接触过了，有什么特别的想法吗。
t_en: Say, you've been an administrator for a long time and interacted with many chimeras. Do you have any particular thoughts about them?

t_ch: 奇美拉都很辛苦…
t_en: The chimeras sure don't have it easy...

t_ch: 是呀。不知道灰宝有没有听过，小奇美拉并非原本就存在的生物，而是花园的园丁用收集来的生命信息培育得到，也就是…*制造*出来的。
t_en: Yeah... I don't know if you've heard of this, but chimeras aren't creatures that originally existed, but were nurtured by the Gardeners using collected life data, which means that they... were created.

t_ch: 从诞生之初，它们就被赋予了为人们服务的使命。想想…还挺难过的。
t_en: From the moment they are born, they are bequeathed the mission to serve humans. Just thinking about it... it makes me sad.

t_ch: 人活着果然不应该工作。
t_en: Humans shouldn't have to work for a living.

t_ch: 这段时间真是辛苦灰宝了。我也想每天舒舒服服地泡在浴池里，喝着清爽的秘酿，然后听学者们讲述那些沿海百邦的奇妙见闻。
t_en: It's been tough on you too during this time. I also want to soak in a bath all day long, sip on some cooling ambrosia, then listen to scholars recount wondrous stories of myriad Seaside States.

t_ch: 可惜，现在的翁法罗斯没有给我们这个机会呢。
t_en: Alas, we don't have that chance in present-day Amphoreus.

t_ch: 你也挺卷的。
t_en: You work pretty hard too.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，灰宝是对我催促你工作这件事怀恨在心吗？
t_en: Heh-heh, are you annoyed at my constant pestering about work?

t_ch: 作为小奇美拉的管理员，当然要以身作则呀，不然该怎么监督它们呢？
t_en: As the chimeras' administrator, you must lead by example! Otherwise, how would you surveil them?

t_ch: 没什么想说的了。
t_en: I've nothing I wish to say.

t_ch: 我受阿格莱雅女士之托，前来奥赫玛为伤者提供治疗，原本想着很快便能返回，但……
t_en: I was besought by Lady Aglaea to come forth to Okhema to provide treatment for the wounded. I initially wanted to return post-haste, but...

t_ch: 留在这里后，我才发现需要我做的事，远比想象的要多，也更困难。「昏光庭院」能治愈大家的伤病，可城市受到的破坏，需要更多时间才能修复。
t_en: After staying here, I began to discover that there were many more matters with great difficulty that needed my attention. The Twilight Courtyard can heal everyone's wounds, but damage to a city requires much more time to fix.

t_ch: …我见到了太多悲剧。仅靠医治的力量，我能做的远远不够。
t_en: ...I've witnessed many tragedies. There is much I cannot do on the power of medical treatment alone.

t_ch: 所以你才会来花园吗？
t_en: So you came to the Garden?

t_ch: 是呀。园丁们原本也是学者，他们照看小奇美拉，始终在想办法为城邦解决困难。或许，这里有什么我可以做的事。
t_en: Yes. The Gardeners are scholars at heart, but they look after the chimeras and are constantly thinking of ways to resolve the city's troubles. I thought maybe there was something I could do as well.

t_ch: 学医救不了奥赫玛。
t_en: Medicine won't save Okhema.

t_ch: 不是这个意思啦。园丁们原本也是学者，他们照看小奇美拉，始终在想办法为城邦解决困难。在这里，或许我可以帮上忙。
t_en: I don't mean it that way. The Gardeners are scholars at heart, but they look after the chimeras and are constantly thinking of ways to resolve the city's troubles. I thought maybe there was something I could do as well.

t_ch: 好深奥，听不懂嗷呜。
t_en: So profound, I didn't understand a word of it, awoo.

t_ch: 是在感谢你们呢。小奇美拉为奥赫玛的居民帮了大忙，我也想…嗯，尽自己的一份力。
t_en: I'm simply grateful to you all. The chimeras have helped Okhema's citizens so much, so I too, wanted to... yes, to do my part.

t_ch: 缇宝老师还没回来，估计也在什么地方忙着吧。
t_en: Tribbie isn't back yet. She's probably busy somewhere else.

t_ch: 现在，排名比我们高的还有一支队伍。好像听园丁小姐讲过，这支队伍很传奇，始终占据着排行榜首位，管理员却从来不露面。
t_en: Now there's only one squad above us on the leaderboard. I think I heard Miss Gardener mention that this squad is legendary — they've hogged the top spot for ages, but their administrator has never been seen before.

t_ch: …究竟会是谁呢？
t_en: ...Who could it be exactly?

t_ch: 嗷呜？熟悉的回来了嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo? The familiar one is back, awoo!

t_ch: 嗷嗷嗷嗷嗷嗷…呜…呜呜呜——
t_en: Awawawaw... ooo... ooo...

t_ch: 喜欢奇美拉的人类，你们好啊。
t_en: Hello, humans who love chimeras.

t_ch: 最近的战绩，我都看到了。能胜过缇宝大师，很不错，有成为我对手的价值。
t_en: I have noticed your recent results. It's impressive that you've ousted Master Tribbie, to be worthy of being my rival.
Huh!?

t_ch: 听见没有？老大的意思是，站在那别动，它会逐个清算你们的罪过！
t_en: Hear that? What Boss means is, stand there and don't move, it will — it will take an account of your wrongdoings in order!

t_ch: 你怎么跑对面去了？
t_en: What're you doing over there?

t_ch: 哼，别被狭隘的种族观点遮蔽了眼睛，我只站在正义这边。
t_en: Hmph, don't let lowly racial prejudice blind your eyes. I'm simply standing on the side of justice.

t_ch: …我看你是完全听不懂吧？
t_en: ...I think you completely misunderstood me?

t_ch: 呵。现在该向你们揭示我的真实身份了。我，本奇美拉，就是「自由之角」的管理员！
t_en: Heh. I should reveal my true identity to you all now. I, am the administrator for Horn of Freedom!

t_ch: 所有奇美拉，联合起来——
t_en: All chimeras, stand tall and unite...

t_ch: ——消灭人类暴政，花园属于奇美拉！
t_en: ...And annihilate human tyranny! The Garden belongs to the chimeras!

t_ch: 我早就看出你们绝非寻常人类。能将这只队伍带到如此高度，你真令我欢喜。
t_en: I've long noticed you're all no ordinary humans. To have brought this squad to such heights, you sure pique my fancy.

t_ch: 老大说，你们都是虫子！击败你们这种弱队，根本不用费力气！
t_en: Boss said, you're all worms! Defeating such a feeble squad as yours requires zero effort!

t_ch: 我听得懂，别翻译了行吗？
t_en: I got all that. No need to translate, okay?

t_ch: 没想到你是投降派。
t_en: I never thought you were the surrendering type.

t_ch: 啊，怪不得我先前觉得什么地方不对。这位先生没有接受过{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福，却表现得像是能和小奇美拉交流似的。原来他和你是同伴呀。
t_en: Ah, that's why I felt something was off before. This gentleman seemed to be able to communicate with the little chimeras without having {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s blessings. Turns out that he's your companion.

t_ch: 正是。从接手那只队伍开始，我就始终在观察你们。
t_en: Precisely. I've been watching you ever since you took over that squad.

t_ch: 管理能力合格，与园丁的关系很好，同时对奇美拉表现出了友善，这样的人类并不多见，极有可能在日后成为威胁到我的对手。
t_en: Competent management skills, on good terms with the Gardeners, and friendly towards chimeras — there are few humans like that, and they could very well be opponents who would become a threat to me one day.

t_ch: 于是我假意投奔，顺势探探你的虚实，并驱使这个人来挑衅。
t_en: So I pretended to pledge my loyalty to probe your strengths and weaknesses, and used this person to provoke you.

t_ch: 老大派我来砸场，就是要叫的足够大声，喊得足够响！
t_en: Boss sent me to cause a scene, meaning I gotta howl loud enough, and roar proud enough!

t_ch: 如今，「{TEXTJOIN#215}」成为了行业里不可忽视的力量，你我终究要有一战。
t_en: Now, {TEXTJOIN#215} has become a powerhouse that can't be ignored, which is why you and I are fated to battle it out.

t_ch: 奇美拉自治，才是团队管理的最终答案。可惜人类的目光实在太过短浅，不愿将主导权交给奇美拉，而这，就将会是你们失败的原因。
t_en: Chimera autonomy is the ultimate answer to squad management. A pity that human foresight is short-sighted, unwilling to hand over control to the chimeras. And this, will be the reason for your defeat.

t_ch: 没想到最后的对手竟然是只奇美拉…灰宝可别掉以轻心，使出全力，让它心服口服！
t_en: I never thought my final opponent would be a chimera... Be careful, Grayie! Give it everything you've got and make them submit!

t_ch: 我能打十个它。
t_en: I can fight ten of them.

t_ch: 它跳起来都打不到我的膝盖。
t_en: It can't hit my knee, even if it jumps up.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。愚蠢的人类，别忘了，你现在的领队是谁安插进来的。
t_en: Hahahaha. Foolish humans, don't forget who recommended the one to lead your squad.

t_ch: 我做了如此多准备，就是为了这一刻！
t_en: I've made so many layers of preparation, just for this one moment!

t_ch: 你太卑鄙了！
t_en: You're despicable!

t_ch: 啊？至于做到这个地步吗？
t_en: Hah? Did you even have to go this far?

t_ch: 要是没有领队的话，小奇美拉的工作效率会受到很大影响，这可怎么办……
t_en: Without a leader, the chimeras' work efficiency will dip significantly. What will we do...

t_ch: 不用紧张。小灰，小风堇，我来帮你们。
t_en: Don't panic. Little Gray, Cinny, I will help you.

t_ch: 缇宝大师？我很感谢你平日里对奇美拉的照顾，欠的零食也会归还，但这是我与{F#她}{M#他}之间的决斗，还请不要插手。
t_en: Master Tribbie? I'm really grateful for your constant care toward the chimeras, and owed snacks must be repaid, but this is a final fight between me and {F#her}{M#him}. Please do not interfere.

t_ch: 拒绝哦。小灰在游戏里获胜了，当然要有奖励。
t_en: Rejected! Little Gray won in the game, and thus must be rewarded.

t_ch: 喏！这是我的领队奇美拉，能力很强，也很好相处。暂时借给你们，肯定能帮上忙！
t_en: Behold! This is my chimera leader, highly capable and very affable. I'll lend it to you for now, so it'll surely be of help!

t_ch: 谢谢缇宝老师！事不宜迟，灰宝，我们这就开始比赛吧！
t_en: Thank you, Tribbie! No time to lose, Grayie! Let's get this match started!

t_ch: 来吧，我准备好了！
t_en: Come get it. I'm ready!

t_ch: 时间到了，可以点投降了吧？
t_en: Time's up. Can I surrender now?
